name: Chocolate Chip-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Thawed frozen apple juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a large baking sheet with nonstick spray.
2. In a large bowl, beat margarine, applesauce, brown sugar, and apple juice concentrate with a mixer on high speed until light and fluffy (the mixture may appear curdled).
3. In a small bowl, combine boiling water, baking soda, and vanilla extract. Beat the mixture into the margarine mixture.
4. Gradually add flour, oats, and salt to the margarine mixture in another large bowl, beating well after each addition. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonsful of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, making 48 cookies. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
